articles.title: Drone footage captures flooding across Oahu, Hawaii
articles.summary: Drone footage shows flooding across Oahu’s North Shore as a second Kona Low storm hits Hawaii.

articles.title: Evloev upsets Murphy, sets up featherweight title shot against Volkanovski
articles.summary: Movsar Evloev rallies after a point deduction against the unbeaten Lerone Murphy to win the contest in London.

articles.title: Trump threatens to ‘obliterate’ Iran power plants unless Hormuz Strait open
articles.summary: Donald Trump has threatened to 'obliterate' Iran’s power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Casualties as Israeli settlers set fire to homes and cars in West Bank
articles.summary: Settlers set fire to homes and cars near Jenin amid reports of widespread violence across the occupied territory.

articles.title: What we know about Iran’s latest attacks on Israel
articles.summary: Israel’s air defence system failed to stop at least two Iranian missile strikes on southern Israel.

articles.title: Will the Houthis join Iran in war against Israel and the US?
articles.summary: The Yemeni armed group says all options are on the table.

articles.title: Trump issues 48-hour Hormuz Strait ultimatum, threatens Iran’s power plants
articles.summary: Iran responds to Trump's threat by saying all US energy infrastructure in the region will be targeted if it is attacked.

articles.title: Iran war live: Trump threatens to attack power plants over Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Donald Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iran's power plants if it fails to open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours.

articles.title: ‘They want to colonise us’: Brazil’s Lula warns of foreign interference
articles.summary: The left-wing Brazilian president is critical of US actions throughout Latin America, though he does not name Trump.

articles.title: Saudi Arabia expels Iran military attache, four embassy staff
articles.summary: Move follows attack on Red Sea port of Yanbu, Saudi Arabia's main oil export outlet, after Iran blocked Hormuz Strait.

articles.title: Iran strikes towns near Israel’s nuclear site, wounds over 100
articles.summary: Iran targets Dimona and Arad, injuring more than 100 people, in retaliation for an attack on its Natanz nuclear site.

articles.title: WHO says attack on Sudan hospital killed 64, including 13 children
articles.summary: The attack on teaching hospital in al-Daein, the capital of East Darfur state, has rendered the facility nonfunctional.

articles.title: ICC Chief Prosecutor Khan cleared of sexual misconduct by judges: Report
articles.summary: Karim Khan has denied the allegations and took voluntary leave from his position in May.

articles.title: State of emergency declared as Iranian missile hits Arad in southern Israel
articles.summary: A state of emergency has been declared in Arad, southern Israel after an Iranian missile strike.

articles.title: US says it has crippled Iranian threat in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: The US says it hit Iranian coastal missile sites and infrastructure, crippling Tehran’s threat to the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: ‘Tears and grief’: Mother’s Day in Gaza marked by mourning
articles.summary: Day of intense hardship as mothers mourn children lost in war and children face day without their mothers.

articles.title: Joe Kent speaks out against Iran war at prayer event after resigning
articles.summary: Joe Kent says he resigned as director of the US National Counterterrorism Center over opposition to the war in Iran.

articles.title: EU urges members to start storing winter gas as Iran war causes price surge
articles.summary: War, which saw Iran attack Qatar facility, has caused 'high, volatile' gas prices that could hit EU storage projections.

articles.title: Eid without toys: Israeli restrictions drive up prices in Gaza
articles.summary: Amid war and supply restrictions, Gaza’s toy markets face shortages and high prices, leaving children without Eid gifts.

articles.title: Flash flooding swamps Hawaii, prompting evacuation orders for 5,500 people
articles.summary: Oahu's emergency office has ordered residents in the Waialua area to 'leave now' amid risk of road failures.

articles.title: Former FBI chief Robert Mueller, known for Trump investigation, dead at 81
articles.summary: Robert Mueller oversaw the probe into alleged Russian interference during the 2016 United States election.

articles.title: Trump threatens to deploy ICE to airports amid Homeland Security shutdown
articles.summary: The US president called on immigration agents to place 'heavy emphasis' on the arrest of Somali immigrants.

articles.title: Tehran holds Eid prayers as funeral held for IRGC spokesman
articles.summary: Eid al-Fitr prayers were held in Tehran after overnight air strikes on the capital.

articles.title: Bahrain says Patriot system intercepted drone over homes
articles.summary: Bahrain's account differs from how the US military described the March 9 incident, which led to civilian injuries.

articles.title: Arab states should beware of Israel’s hegemonic energy expansion
articles.summary: The Iran war revealed how dependent Israel’s Arab neighbours are on its gas exports.
